title: When table/column names conflicts, data ends in multiple tables!
key_bug_features: Conflicting table/column names cause data misplacement.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE foo_bar (baz INT NOT NULL, id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY);
CREATE TABLE foo (bar_baz INT, id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY);
SELECT f.id, f.bar_baz, fb.baz FROM foo f LEFT JOIN foo_bar fb ON f.id = fb.id;
